'''Tuga SalPivo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] who was in [[Mercenary/Legends|the employ]] of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was tasked with the mission of killing the [[t'landa Til]] priests that resided in [[Colony Eight]] on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. He rigged the priests' sleeping chambers with explosives, and he succeeded in his mission, killing all of the t'landa Til inside. SalPivo was one of many mercenaries and [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] who prepared the [[Planet/Legends|world]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Battle of Ylesia|invasion]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
